problem id: 1c566511
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(7) XOR SHL(6)

examples:
  10100001 -> 10010000
  11111011 -> 00111101
  01000111 -> 01100011
  01110000 -> 00111000
  11011100 -> 01101110
  10010110 -> 11001011
  00000001 -> 11000000
  01100101 -> 11110010
  00001100 -> 00000110
  11000100 -> 01100010

query: 10100100
predicted answer: 01010010
